creator: dchapes@ddm.on.ca
text:
The tarball for games/ifm version 3.0 is no longer available on the
master site (hense the medium instead of priority on this PR).

Fix: The following patch will bring the port up-to version 4.1.

Portlint says it's okay.  It installs, packages, deinstalls, pkg_adds
and pkg_deletes successfully.

Note that patch-aa is no longer needed and that the tarball no longer
includes installable man pages (although it still has info pages which
the port installs).  Also I've added several mirror ftp sites.
